description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is made from polished wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic shape that extends from the butt to the fore-end. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted along the top. The bolt handle protrudes from the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The rifle has an internal magazine, with no detachable box magazine visible. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, such as the Mauser or Mosin-Nagant.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a polished wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel, featuring iron sights and a protruding bolt handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the round barrel profile and the narrow width of the rifle, with the front sight visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, barrel, and the bolt handle on the right side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the top of the receiver, with the bolt handle and rear sight visible.
